summary: ACE shows strong reported gains, but the evidence supports its mechanism only in a bounded way: structured context updates help when feedback is informative and memory is not damaged by bad rewrites.

bounded_claims.claim_text: ACE outperforms strong baselines across the paper's benchmark set, with aggregate gains on agent and finance tasks.
bounded_claims.bounds: This is descriptive benchmark evidence only. It does not identify one validated causal mechanism explaining all gains across both domains.

bounded_claims.claim_text: ACE reaches production-level competitiveness on AppWorld, matching the top-ranked production agent overall and beating IBM CUGA on the harder test-challenge split.
bounded_claims.bounds: The evidence supports a benchmark-bounded outcome claim, not a full explanation of why the smaller open-source system matched or exceeded those production systems, and not a guarantee outside the reported AppWorld evaluations.
